This lesson covers the fundamental measu: 这个课程涵盖了分析和总结数据集的中心的基本测量方法。 您将学会如何计算和应用平均值、 中位数和模式, 并了解何时最合适 。
Given: (1) A -> B, Delta H = -100 kJ; (2: 给出:(1) A - > B, Delta H = - 100 kJ;(2) B - > C, Delta H = + 50 kJ。
By Hess's law: Delta H(A -> C) = Delta H: 根据Hess的法律:Delta H(A - > C) = Delta H(A - > B) + Delta H(B - > C) = - 100 + 50 = - 50 kJ。
Given: C(s) + O2(g) -> CO2(g), Delta H =: C(s) + O2(g) - > CO2(g),Delta H = - 393.5 kJ;CO(g) + 1/2 O2(g) - > CO2(g) - > CO2(g),Delta H = - 283.0 kJ。 C(s) + 1/2 O2(g) - > CO(g) 什么是Delta H ?
Use equation 1 as written and reverse eq: 将方程1作为书面和反向方程2:CO2 - > CO + 1/2 O2, Delta H = + 283.0。加上: C + O2 + CO2 - > CO2 + CO + 1/2 O2。简化: C + 1/2 O2 - > CO Delta H = - 393.5 + 283.0 = -110.5 kJ。
A student needs to find Delta H for the: 学生需要为反应找到Delta H : C(graphite) + 2H2(g) - > CH4(g). 鉴于:(1) C(graphite) + O2(g) - > CO2(g), Delta H = - 393.5 kJ; (2) H2(g) + 1/2 O2(g) - > H2O(l), Delta H = - 285.8 kJ; (3) CH4(g) + 2O2(g) - > CO2(g) + 2H2(l), Delta H = - 890.4 kJ. 目标反应的Delta H是什么?
An engineer wants to know the enthalpy o: 工程师想要知道乙醇形成过程的,但无法直接测量。 使用燃烧数据: Delta Hc( C2H5OH) = - 1 367 kJ/ mol, Delta Hc( C) = - 393.5, Delta Hc( H2) = - 285. 8, 什么是 Delta Hf( C2H5OH) ?
A materials scientist needs Delta H for:: 2Fe + 3/2 O2(g) - > Fe2O3 (s) + 3CO(g) - > 2Fe2O3 + 3CO(g) - > 2Fe + 3CO2(g), Delta H = - 26.7 kJ; (2) CO(g) + 1/2 O2(g) - > CO2(g), Delta H = - 283.0 kJ。 什么是 Delta H?
A chemical company produces calcium oxid: 化学公司生产氧化钙(quicklime),使用:CaCO3 - > CaO + CO2(g),Delta Hf(CaCO3) = - 1206.9 kJ/mol, Delta Hf(CaO) = - 635.1 kJ/mol, Delta Hf(CO2) = - 393.5 kJ/mol。
Delta H = [Delta Hf(CaO) + Delta Hf(CO2): Delta HH = [Delta Hf(CaO) + Delta Hf(CO2) - Delta Hf(CaCO3) = [635.1 + (-393.5)] - (1206.9) = - 1028.6 + 1206.9 = + 178.3 kJ. 分解为终端热。
Given the Born-Haber cycle for NaCl: Na(: 鉴于NaCl:Na(s) - > Na(g),Delta H = + 108 kJ;Na(g) - > Na+(g) + e-,Delta H = + 496 kJ; 1/2 Cl2(g) - > Cl(g), Delta H = + 122 kJ; Cl(g) + e - > Cl(g), Delta H = - 349 kJ; Na+(g) + Cl-(g) - > NaCl (s), Del H =?如果Delta Hf(NaCl) = - 411 kJ, latice能量是什么?
A researcher wants Delta H for the hypot: 研究者想要Delta H 进行假设反应: 3C( graphite) + 4H2( g) - > C3H8( g) 。 使用 : Delta Hf( C3H8) = - 10. 38 kJ/ mol 。 答案是什么 ?
The reaction 3C(graphite) + 4H2(g) -> C3: 3C(地形) + 4H2(g) - > C3H8(g) IS 是丙烷的形成反应。根据定义,其Delta H 是标准成形 = -103.8 kJ。
A student needs to find Delta H for: SO2: 学生需要找到Delta H, 原因是: SO2(g) + 1/2 O2(g) - > SO3(g). 鉴于:(1) S(s) + O2(g) - > SO2(g) - > SO2(g) - > SO2(g), Delta H = - 296.8 kJ; (2) S(s) + 3/2 O2(g) - > SO3(g), Delta H = - 395.7 kJ. 答案是什么?
When you multiply a reaction by a coeffi: 当你乘以系数乘以一个反应来应用赫斯的法律时, 你对德尔塔H做了什么?
Since enthalpy is extensive, multiplying: 由于广泛,因此所有系数乘以因子 n 乘以因子 n 也乘以德尔塔H 乘以 n。
